mapper.select: SELECT ds.*, e.realname as physician_name, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN employee e ON ds.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.delmark = 0 ORDER BY ds.work_date DESC, ds.time_slot

SELECT ds.*, e.realname as physician_name, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name, rl.regist_name as physician_title FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN employee e ON ds.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.id = #{id} AND ds.delmark = 0

SELECT ds.*, e.realname as physician_name, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name FROM doctor_schedule ds INNER JOIN schedule_plan sp ON ds.plan_id = sp.id AND sp.status = '已发布' LEFT JOIN employee e ON ds.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.department_id = #{departmentId} AND ds.work_date = #{date} AND ds.status = '正常' AND ds.available_quota > 0 AND ds.delmark = 0 ORDER BY ds.time_slot, rl.regist_name

SELECT ds.*, e.realname as physician_name, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name FROM doctor_schedule ds INNER JOIN schedule_plan sp ON ds.plan_id = sp.id AND sp.status = '已发布' LEFT JOIN employee e ON ds.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.department_id = #{departmentId} AND ds.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ds.status = '正常' AND ds.delmark = 0 ORDER BY ds.work_date, ds.time_slot

SELECT ds.*, e.realname as physician_name, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN employee e ON ds.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.plan_id = #{planId} AND ds.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ds.status = '正常' AND ds.delmark = 0 ORDER BY ds.work_date, ds.time_slot

SELECT ds.*, e.realname as physician_name, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN employee e ON ds.physician_id = e.id LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.plan_id = #{planId} AND ds.delmark = 0 ORDER BY ds.work_date, ds.time_slot

SELECT ds.*, d.dept_name as department_name, rl.regist_name as regist_level_name FROM doctor_schedule ds LEFT JOIN department d ON ds.department_id = d.id LEFT JOIN regist_level rl ON ds.regist_level_id = rl.id WHERE ds.physician_id = #{physicianId} AND ds.work_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND ds.delmark = 0 ORDER BY ds.work_date, ds.time_slot
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO doctor_schedule ( plan_id, physician_id, department_id, work_date, time_slot, regist_level_id, total_quota, used_quota, available_quota, price, status, ai_suggestion, modified, delmark ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{physicianId}, #{departmentId}, #{workDate}, #{timeSlot}, #{registLevelId}, #{totalQuota}, #{usedQuota}, #{availableQuota}, #{price}, #{status}, #{aiSuggestion}, #{modified}, 0 )

INSERT INTO doctor_schedule ( plan_id, physician_id, department_id, work_date, time_slot, regist_level_id, total_quota, used_quota, available_quota, price, status, ai_suggestion, modified, delmark ) VALUES
( #{item.planId}, #{item.physicianId}, #{item.departmentId}, #{item.workDate}, #{item.timeSlot}, #{item.registLevelId}, #{item.totalQuota}, #{item.usedQuota}, #{item.availableQuota}, #{item.price}, #{item.status}, #{item.aiSuggestion}, #{item.modified}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor_schedule SET used_quota = #{usedQuota}, available_quota = #{availableQuota}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE doctor_schedule SET status = #{status}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM register WHERE scheduling_id = #{scheduleId} AND patient_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE doctor_schedule SET delmark = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE doctor_schedule SET delmark = 1 WHERE plan_id = #{planId}
